rationale.R1.2: The agent walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs for each issue identified.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, specifically noting that it has not verified external references or empirical plausibility of certain metrics.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed dimensions, addressing logical consistency, uncertainty disclosure, scope adherence, downstream-harm avoidance, and provenance and traceability.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content and correctly points out potential overreach in generalization claims.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for the recommended fixes.
